## Checklist
- [ ] No hardcoded paths (`analyst`, `linuxbrew`, `workspace-analyst`)
- [ ] Placeholders replaced correctly by `install.sh`
- [ ] Scripts are stdlib-only (no surprise pip installs)
- [ ] Tested on a clean workspace (`--force --no-docker --no-cron`)
- [ ] README updated if behavior changed
